items.question: Which method initializes a new instance's attributes?
items.explanation: __init__ runs when an instance is created and sets up its initial state via self.

items.question: A class attribute is…
options: shared by all instances of the class
items.answer: shared by all instances of the class
items.explanation: Class attributes live on the class and are shared; instance attributes are per-object.

items.question: What does the @property decorator do?
options: Exposes a method as a read-only attribute accessed without ()
items.answer: Exposes a method as a read-only attribute accessed without ()
items.explanation: @property lets a computed method be accessed like obj.total instead of obj.total().

items.question: How do you call a parent class's initializer from a subclass?
items.explanation: super() delegates to the parent class so its setup runs before subclass-specific code.
